title: Two-Tailed Rat
move_pattern: Randomly cycles between Scratch, Disease Bite, Screech, and Call for Backup based on a weighted distribution.
notes: This monster can summon additional copies of itself via Call for Backup. Summoning is restricted by two mechanics: (1) a 2-turn cooldown (TurnsUntilSummonable starts at 2 and decrements each turn), and (2) a hard limit of 3 total summons (tracked by CallForBackupCount). When a rat summons another, all rats on the battlefield synchronize their CallForBackupCount to prevent excessive summoning. Call for Backup also cannot be used if a teammate already has it queued as their next move. The monster's appearance is randomized with different barnacle and head skins.
